challenge.title: Korak 9
challenge.description:
Sada je vreme da dodamo činjenice za svaku planetu. Unutar prvog p elementa, dodajte sledeći tekst: Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Unutar drugog p elementa, dodajte sledeći tekst: Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Unutar trećeg p elementa, dodajte sledeći tekst: Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.

tests.text: Your first p element should contain the facts about Earth. Make sure your text matches the provided description.
Your second p element should contain the facts about Saturn. Make sure your text matches the provided description.
Your third p element should contain the facts about Mars. Make sure your text matches the provided description.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Planets

Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.
